checks.name: winding torque margin exceeds 1.5x working upper torque
stored energy covers 60 s design holdover with losses

control.recharge_trigger: barrel cam or angle flag at 200 Nmm equivalent low threshold
control.stop_trigger: barrel cam or angle flag at 800 Nmm equivalent high threshold
control.overwind_protection: slip clutch set below spring max torque plus electrical motor cutoff
control.reverse_flow_protection: one-way ratchet from drum to barrel
